EmperorsFavourRules.Rule1: Emperor's Favour is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring 2x2 symbols and a guaranteed 3x3 symbol in Free Spins Feature.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 30 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{minBetMtp} and %{maxBetMtp} will be replaced by multiplier, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 30 bet line (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

EmperorsFavourRules.Rule3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

EmperorsFavourFreeSpinFeature.Explain1: 3, 4 or 5 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10, 15 or 20 free spins respectively.
EmperorsFavourFreeSpinFeature.Explain2: During Free Spins Feature, any 3x3 symbol (excluding Scatter symbol) will appear on reel 2, 3 and 4.
EmperorsFavourFreeSpinFeature.Explain3: Scatter symbol does not appear during Free Spins Feature.

EmperorsFavourCommonRule.WildExplanation: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.

EmperorsPopOutSymbolDesc.ScatterDesc: 3 Scatter symbols will trigger free spins
